text: There is a sense of ending, a pause that invites me to reflect. Sitting near an empty conference room and a wall filled with ideas, I feel both a gentle melancholy and a quiet anticipation. Here, I am aware of how quickly moments pass, how learning and thought persist even after farewells are said. The world seems to offer me a place to ponder, surrounded by traces of intellect and invention, yet now silent, waiting for the next beginning.
